title: EmptyState — Zero-Content Placeholder with Action
problem: Several screens (Session List, Clip List, Band Members) can be empty on first visit or after deletes. A blank screen gives no guidance on what to do next — users need a visual cue that emptiness is intentional plus a clear next action.
analysis:
Centered layout: icon (large, text-muted), heading (text-xl text-primary), subtext (text-sm text-secondary), optional primary CTA button. Used by:
- Session List empty: icon=mic, heading='No sessions yet', subtext='Tap Record to capture your first jam', CTA='Record'
- Clip List empty: icon=music-note, heading='No clips', subtext='Start a new session to record'
- Member list empty: icon=users, heading='Just you', subtext='Share the invite link to bring your bandmates'
The `actionHref` prop uses ButtonLink for client-side navigation. `onAction` callback prop available for non-navigation actions (e.g., opening the tab).
successCriteria:
- Renders in center of available space (flex col, items-center, justify-center, min-h set by caller)
- Icon: lucide icon name passed as prop, rendered at 48px, text-muted color
- Heading: text-xl text-primary font-semibold
- Subtext: text-sm text-secondary mt-2
- CTA button: amber primary variant, shown only when actionLabel prop is provided
- Role-conditional CTA: Record button hidden for MEMBER-role users on Session List empty state (caller handles role check before passing actionLabel prop)
implementation: components/ui/EmptyState.tsx: props { icon: LucideIcon, heading: string, subtext?: string, actionLabel?: string, actionHref?: string, onAction?: () => void }. Renders icon via `<Icon className='w-12 h-12 text-muted' />`. ButtonLink if actionHref provided; Button with onClick if onAction provided. Neither if no actionLabel.

decisions.decision: Role-based CTA filtering is the caller's responsibility, not EmptyState's
decisions.rationale: EmptyState is a generic UI primitive — it should not know about band roles. The caller (Session List page) passes actionLabel only when the current user is allowed to take that action. EmptyState renders whatever it receives.
decisions.recommendation: In the Session List page server component: pass actionLabel='Record' only when role !== 'MEMBER'. EmptyState remains role-agnostic.

knownLimitations: Only supports a single CTA — multi-action empty states (e.g., 'Create band' or 'Join band') must be handled with custom layouts
userGuide: When a list has no items, a helpful message appears explaining the empty state and offering the next action to take.
